welcome_message: If you want to opt out and detach yourself from us follow the steps in this channel. Click on offboard if you want to continue.
after_doc_message: Please go through the document and follow the steps. When you are done, click continue below.
form_intro: Please answer the following questions. Send one message per answer.

form_questions.prompt: What is your trading platform username?
Why do you want to opt out?

submitted_message: Thank you. We have received your offboard request and will reach out to you within 3-5 working days.
